[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0010010000 2
3 1011000001 4
4 0001001011 4
5 0000010000 1
6 0001000000 1
7 0001001001 3
